name: Fantasy RPG
description:
Warning: This is meant to be a nearly lawless world, so slavery and prostitution is allowed. Also there's supposed to be Futa and Femboys in case you aren't into that, they aren't everywhere but they exist in the world. Although in my tests they almost never naturally appeared.

Took a break from bot stuff and now (December 29th 2024) anything in square brackets [ ] seem to mess with bots on here, gonna remove them for now. It's gonna make the messages look a little worse but at least it should still function... Maybe.
---


My attempt at a fantasy RPG bot because all the ones I've found are lacking in one way or another in my opinion. I kept the tokens pretty low while also trying to keep it okay in quality. Let me know how it works for you and if you got any suggestions I'd love to hear them. I've got some other bots cooking up but I wanna test them a bit more before publishing them, people bots are a bit more finnicky than a general scenario bot lol.
creator: True Ruhe
